changelog: **`.githooks/pre-commit`**: runs `node scripts/check-markdown-filenames.mjs` on staged `.md` files to enforce lowercase hyphen-case and sequence-first subtask naming before commits land. Enable per clone with `git config core.hooksPath .githooks`.
**`.githooks/readme.md`**: documents the hook contract, opt-in command, and bypass policy.

**`standalone-scripts/macro-controller/src/ui/__tests__/prompt-editor-diff.test.ts`**: added `window.localStorage.clear()` to the `beforeEach` block so the diff-toggle persistence introduced in v4.192.0 no longer leaks the "diff pane open" state across tests. Root cause: the "updates live as the textarea changes while open" case started with the pane already open (leaked flag), so its toggle click closed the pane instead of opening it, producing `expected [] to include 'add'`. All 8 tests in the suite now pass.
